'''fawacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nocino|nocino]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-w-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nocino|nocino]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fawacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæwæchæth|fæwæchæth]] || [[word:fæwæchæj|fæwæchæj]] || [[word:fæwæchæsh|fæwæchæsh]] || [[word:fæwæchæ|fæwæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fawawachath|fawawachath]] || [[word:fawawachaj|fawawachaj]] || [[word:fawawachash|fawawachash]] || [[word:fawawacha|fawawacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fawachath|fawachath]] || [[word:fawachaj|fawachaj]] || [[word:fawachash|fawachash]] || [[word:fawacha|fawacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fawafchath|fawafchath]] || [[word:fawafchaj|fawafchaj]] || [[word:fawafchash|fawafchash]] || [[word:fawafchaf|fawafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fawachatha|fawachatha]] || [[word:fawachaja|fawachaja]] || [[word:fawachasha|fawachasha]] || [[word:fawachaka|fawachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fawachath|fawachath]] || [[word:fawachaj|fawachaj]] || [[word:fawachash|fawachash]] || [[word:fawacha|fawacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fawachathal|fawachathal]] || [[word:fawachajal|fawachajal]] || [[word:fawachashal|fawachashal]] || [[word:fawachakal|fawachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fawachathatha|fawachathatha]] || [[word:fawachajaja|fawachajaja]] || [[word:fawachashasha|fawachashasha]] || [[word:fawachaka|fawachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fawachathan|fawachathan]] || [[word:fawachajan|fawachajan]] || [[word:fawachashan|fawachashan]] || [[word:fawachakan|fawachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fawachathaoro|fawachathaoro]] || [[word:fawachajaoro|fawachajaoro]] || [[word:fawachashaoro|fawachashaoro]] || [[word:fawachakaoro|fawachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
